title: lotononis tenella var. calycina
intro: Lotononis tenella var. calycina is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and uses in traditional medicine. It is a type of plant that has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities, which help to soothe sore throats, reduce congestion, and promote cough relief. Herbal preparations of Lotononis tenella var. calycina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
